zucchini-and-corn-frittata.name: Zucchini And Corn Frittata
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, heavy cream, 1 teaspoon of salt, and the ricotta.

Heat a 12-inch (30 cm) cast-iron or stainless steel skillet over medium-high heat. Add the bacon and cook until crisp, 3–5 minutes. Using tongs, transfer the bacon from the pan to a paper towel-lined plate, leaving the rendered bacon fat in the pan.
Add the onion to the pan and cook until caramelized, 8–10 minutes.
Add the garlic and red pepper flakes and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add the zucchini and sauté until starting to soften, 2–3 minutes.
Add the corn and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the zucchini softens further but is still bright green. Season with the remaining teaspoon of salt and the black pepper.
Pour the egg mixture into the pan over the vegetables, then top with the crispy bacon.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 12–15 minutes, until the top is puffed and the eggs are cooked through.
Garnish with parsley, then serve directly from the skillet.
Enjoy!

zucchini-bread-with-pineapple.name: Zucchini Bread With Pineapple
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease and flour a 4x6-inch loaf pan.
Combine flour, white sugar, cinnamon, baking soda, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.

Whisk egg, pineapple juice, and oil together in a separate bowl until well combined; stir into flour mixture until crumbly and dry. Stir in zucchini and crushed pineapple until moist, blended, and very thick; pour into the prepared loaf pan.
Combine oats, coconut, and brown sugar in a separate bowl; toss in margarine with a fork until crumbly. Sprinkle topping over batter.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean, 40 to 60 minutes. Cool before serving.

zucchini-burgers-recipe-and-comedera.name: Zucchini Burgers Recipe, And
zucchini-burgers-recipe-and-comedera.original_name: Receta de hamburguesas de calabacín, fáciles y rápidas
instructions: Start your recipe, frilling the pumpkin or processing them till they are crushed. Once you have finished, you will pass it to an absorbing paper or a clean cloth, press till the liquid is squeezed to make the vegetable dry.
Corta la cebolla en cubos muy finos. Reserva.
In a bowl, put the pumpkin and you'll have salt and pepper. Also add the herbal mix.
Incorporates the egg and wheat flour. Also some olive oil.
With the help of your hands or a spatula, mix well till they integrate.
Ahora, tapa con papel film y lleva al refrigerador por 15 minutos para que se compacte un poco.
After that time, heat up an iron or grill with some olive oil. Fold your hands and make balls with dough. Be sure they're all the same size.
Crackle the balls till they are as cheeseburgers and cook by Cooking for 7 minutes from each side with medium heat or till they are doradite.
When ready put them on a plate with absorbing paper and ready. Just come with anything you care about.
Enjoy!
